name: GE Vernova (Proficy) Industrial Software API
what_it_does: GE Vernova Proficy REST APIs for industrial software platform covering historian, MES, and SCADA applications. Enables AI agents to manage Proficy Historian real-time and historical time series data retrieval for industrial analytics, handle Proficy Manufacturing Execution System (MES) production order and work-in-progress data, access equipment and asset performance analytics from Proficy APM, retrieve alarm and event data from Proficy CIMPLICITY SCADA for operations monitoring, manage Proficy Smart Signal predictive analytics data for equipment failure prediction, handle plant metrics and downtime tracking data for OEE management, access energy management and sustainability data for industrial ESG reporting, retrieve batch and recipe management data for process manufacturing, manage operator workflow and shift handover data, and integrate industrial data with ERP, historian, and cloud analytics platforms.
use_cases: Querying historian process data from industrial analytics agents
Monitoring production order status from MES integration agents
Accessing equipment health from predictive maintenance agents
Tracking energy consumption from sustainability reporting agents
not_for: Non-GE/Emerson industrial environments without Proficy ecosystem
Commercial facilities without industrial manufacturing and power generation context
Cloud-native IoT without Proficy on-premise historian and MES footprint
best_when: A power utility, chemical plant, or manufacturer using GE Proficy products wants AI agents to automate historian data retrieval, production order monitoring, predictive maintenance, and energy analytics.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Proficy connects to SCADA and industrial control systems — automated control commands without safety interlock validation and process engineer authorization creates industrial safety risks. Power grid and nuclear plant Proficy deployments have additional NERC-CIP and NRC regulatory requirements for automated access. Alarm automation must preserve operator acknowledgment per ISA-18.2.

auth.notes: Proficy uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Proficy Historian REST API available from version 7.0+. On-premise primary deployment; cloud options via GE Vernova. No webhooks — polling for data events. .NET/COM API (primary) alongside REST. Boston, Massachusetts HQ (GE Vernova). GE Digital became GE Vernova (2023) via GE restructuring.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise license per product
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual license per Proficy product (Historian, MES, SCADA, APM) and user count
pricing.notes: Boston, Massachusetts. GE Vernova (formerly GE Digital). Proficy platform: Historian (time series), CIMPLICITY (SCADA/HMI), MES (plant operations), Smart Signal (predictive). Strong in power utilities, oil & gas, and chemical manufacturing. GE restructuring created GE Vernova as standalone energy company (2023). Competes with AVEVA and OSIsoft PI for historian market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; product and server configuration dependent

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: Proficy SCADA access in power grid and process safety applications requires NERC-CIP and IEC 61511 compliance; automated control without safety review creates regulatory and safety incidents
GE Vernova restructuring — GE Digital became GE Vernova (2023); product branding and support organization changing; verify current product and documentation status
On-premise primary — most Proficy deployments are on-premise; cloud access requires VPN or GE Vernova cloud connector; understand network architecture
.NET/COM primary API — Proficy legacy API is .NET/COM; REST API is newer and may not have full feature parity; verify REST coverage for your use case
NERC-CIP compliance — power utility Proficy deployments are NERC-CIP regulated; automated access must comply with CIP-005 (ESP), CIP-007 (system security), and CIP-011 (information protection)
Historian tag licensing — Proficy Historian tags are licensed; large-scale tag queries must be within license limits; verify tag count before bulk data extraction
agent_readiness.security_notes: Industrial historian and MES. SOC2, IEC62443, NERC-CIP. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Process and production data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Industrial OT software. SOC2, NERC-CIP, IEC62443. OAuth2. US/EU. Industrial process data.
